title: Nostaliga
blurb: A timeline of everything you've done — music, workouts, photos, and check-ins reconstructed into one personal history, all on-device.

title: Cobalt Theme
blurb: Chrome extension that brought dark mode to YouTube and GitHub before they had one.

title: Wooter
blurb: iOS and Android app for sports leagues — live scores, teams, players, and game schedules.
